'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 6''' was published in March [[1978]] by [[Paradise Press]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"The Lowdown on [[R2-D2/Legends|Artoo]]," by [[John May]]: an extended profile of the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]].
*"[[The Spaceships of Star Wars]]," by [[Jon Trux]]: a behind-the-scenes look at the various spacecraft in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|the original ''Star Wars'' film]], including the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Rebel Blockade Runner]], the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing Fighter]], the [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-Wing]], the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]], and the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]
*"An Alien Universe", by [[Michael Marten|Dr. M. F. Marten]]: an article exploring the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] seen on film, with speculation about their role in [[The galaxy/Legends|the greater galaxy]].
